ruleExplore.author: $.author
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(String(result), baseUrl);
var arr = [];
var seen = {};
// 1. 封面推荐卡片 .col-md-6.mb-3
var cards = doc.select(".col-md-6.mb-3");
for(var i=0;i<cards.size();i++){
  var card = cards.get(i);
  var titleA = card.select("h6.book-title a").first();
  if(titleA == null) continue;
  var url = titleA.attr("abs:href");
  if(url === "" || seen[url]) continue;
  seen[url] = true;
  var name = titleA.text().trim();
  var authorEl = card.select("p.book-author").first();
  var author = authorEl ? authorEl.text().replace("作者：","").trim() : "";
  var coverEl = card.select("img.book-cover").first();
  var cover = coverEl ? coverEl.attr("abs:src") : "";
  var introEl = card.select("p.book-desc").first();
  var intro = introEl ? introEl.text().trim() : "";
  if(name !== "") arr.push({name:name, author:author, url:url, coverUrl:cover, intro:intro});
}
// 2. 最新入库列表 ul.new-book-list li
var newItems = doc.select("ul.new-book-list li");
for(var i=0;i<newItems.size();i++){
  var li = newItems.get(i);
  var a = li.select("a").first();
  if(a == null) continue;
  var url = a.attr("abs:href");
  if(url === "" || seen[url]) continue;
  seen[url] = true;
  var name = a.text().trim();
  var span = li.select("span").first();
  var author = span ? span.text().trim() : "";
  if(name !== "") arr.push({name:name, author:author, url:url, coverUrl:"", intro:""});
}
// 3. 编辑推荐列表 ul.latest-list li
var latestItems = doc.select("ul.latest-list li");
for(var i=0;i<latestItems.size();i++){
  var li = latestItems.get(i);
  var a = li.select("a.latest-title").first();
  if(a == null) continue;
  var url = a.attr("abs:href");
  if(url === "" || seen[url]) continue;
  seen[url] = true;
  var name = a.text().trim();
  var span = li.select("span.latest-author").first();
  var author = span ? span.text().trim() : "";
  if(name !== "") arr.push({name:name, author:author, url:url, coverUrl:"", intro:""});
}
// 4. 最近更新表格 table.update-table tbody tr
var rows = doc.select("table.update-table tbody tr");
for(var i=0;i<rows.size();i++){
  var tr = rows.get(i);
  var tds = tr.select("td");
  if(tds.size() < 2) continue;
  var a = tds.get(0).select("a").first();
  if(a == null) continue;
  var url = a.attr("abs:href");
  if(url === "" || seen[url]) continue;
  seen[url] = true;
  var name = a.text().trim();
  var author = tds.get(1).text().trim();
  var lastCh = tds.size() > 2 ? tds.get(2).text().trim() : "";
  if(name !== "") arr.push({name:name, author:author, url:url, coverUrl:"", intro:lastCh});
}
JSON.stringify(arr)
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
page=result.match(/var c\=\"(.*?)\"/)?.[1]
//java.log(page)
function decrypt(encryptedString) {
    let encryptedData_ = String(java.base64Decode(encryptedString));
    let controlNum = parseInt(encryptedData_.slice(8, 11));
    //java.log(controlNum)
    let text = encryptedData_.slice(controlNum + 11, encryptedData_.length - controlNum);
     let encryptedData = text.replace(/_/g,"8L3A+").replace(/-/g, "PHA+");
     return java.base64Decode(encryptedData);
}
result1=decrypt(page)
result2=java.getString('#chaptercontent@p@html')
result=result2 + result1
</js>

<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
//java.log(String(bes))
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    var txt = java.getString(".word_read@p@text",ml);
    java.toast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

<js>
java.longToast("如果失败可能网址失效了");
(function() {
    try {
        // 第一步：获取HTML
        var baseUrl = "https://ztopaqt4g7g7.hq555.icu:1678";
        var html = java.connect(baseUrl + "/so").getBody();
        if (!html) return '';
        
        // 第二步：解析HTML
        var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(html);
        
        // 第三步：获取标题元素
        var titles = doc.select('.layui-tab-item-title');
        // java.log("找到标题数量: " + titles.size());
        
        if (titles.size() < 3) {
            java.log("标题数量不足3个");
            return '';
        }
        
        // 第四步：定位第二个和第三个标题
        var secondTitle = titles.get(1);
        var thirdTitle = titles.get(2);
        
        // java.log("第二个标题: " + secondTitle.text());
       //  java.log("第三个标题: " + thirdTitle.text());
        
        // 第五步：遍历中间的元素
        var results = [];
        var currentElement = secondTitle.nextElementSibling();
        var elementCount = 0;
        
        while (currentElement && !currentElement.equals(thirdTitle)) {
            elementCount++;
            
            if (currentElement.hasClass('layui-tab-item-tagContainer')) {
                // java.log("找到第" + elementCount + "个tagContainer");
                
                var links = currentElement.select('a');
                java.log("该容器中有" + links.size() + "个链接");
                
                for (var i = 0; i < links.size(); i++) {
                    var link = links.get(i);
                    
                    // 提取名称
                    var span = link.selectFirst('span.layui-tab-item-tagContainer-tag');
                    var name = '';
                    if (span) {
                        name = span.text().trim();
                    } else {
                        name = link.text().trim();
                    }
                    
                    // 提取链接
                    var href = link.attr('href');
                    
                    if (name && href) {
                        // 处理相对链接
                        if (!href.startsWith('http')) {
                            if (href.startsWith('/')) {
                                href = baseUrl + href;
                                href = href +"/{{page}}";
                            } else {
                                href = baseUrl + '/' + href;
                                href = href +"/{{page}}";
                            }
                        }
                        
                        results.push(name + "::" + href);
                        java.log("添加: " + name + " -> " + href);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            currentElement = currentElement.nextElementSibling();
        }
        
        java.log("总共处理了" + elementCount + "个元素");
        java.log("最终结果数量: " + results.length);
        
        return results.join('\n');
        
    } catch (error) {
        java.log("捕获到错误: " + error);
        return '';
    }
})()
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var bookId = baseUrl.match(/(\d+)/)[1]
result = java.ajax("https://wxapp.qidian.com/api/book/categoryV2?bookId=" + bookId + "&_csrfToken=")
var charts = [];
JSON.parse(result).data.vs.map(i => {
    i.cs.map(o => {
        var chart = {
            "id": o.id,
            "title": o.cN,
            "v": o.sS == 0,
            "t": o.uT + "  " + o.cnt + "字"
        }
        var content_url = {
            bookId: bookId,
            id: o.id,
            v: o.sS == 0
        }
        content_url = java.base64Encode(JSON.stringify(content_url));
        chart.url = `data:;base64,${content_url},{"type":"qtqd"}`;
        charts.push(chart);
    })
})
charts;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
try {
    var parsedResult = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
    var cid = parsedResult.id;
    var bookId = parsedResult.bookId;
    var isVip = parsedResult.v;
    java.log(isVip)
    var url;
    if (!isVip) {
        url = `https://66shuba.com/api/novel/chapter/${bookId}/${cid}`;
    } else {
        url = `https://66shuba.com/api/novel/vip-chapter/${bookId}/${cid}`;
    }
   java.log(url)
    var data = java.ajax(url);
    
    if (!data) {
        java.log('AJAX请求失败');
    }

    try {
       
        var response = JSON.parse(data);

        content = response.data?.content || response.message
    } catch (e) {
        java.log('解析响应JSON失败: ' + e);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.log('解析初始JSON失败: ' + e);
}
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
//java.log(String(bes))
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    var txt = java.getString("#txt@html",ml);
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    // 遍历数组，使用阅读内置Base64解码方法
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterName:
text@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

snk=java.md5Encode("a=1&ac=999&appType=0&appid=10001&appverion=508500&autoBuy=0&bidType=0&birt=1706674841000&ch=blf1298_10928_001&chType=6&chapter_name="+c+"&cid=eef_easou_book&dzh=1&gender=1&gid="+gid+"&gsort=0&instId="+t+"&instime="+t+"&nid="+nid+"&os=android&pr=-1.0&ptype=5&pushid=7b4aaf1210a5bdbac3cea26d5030a419&recSw=1&rtype=2&scp=0&sequence=1&session_id=153F4EEE16F56A43FD63ZD21B866413ED9BE044EFB876A115C62DBED82EE4C824D&sgsort=0&sort="+s+"&tm=0&udid=3d3ec742930b635fc4c61f0575dbc4d2939edbe2&userInitPay=3&utype=0&vm=5.8.5&key=EaSoU0517+PuBlIsHkEy-JRKKOWTUNZCNTWY-");
snk = snk.toUpperCase();

url=`https://api.ieasou.com/api/bookapp/chargeChapter.m?a=1&autoBuy=0&cid=eef_easou_book&vm=5.8.5&os=android&udid=3d3ec742930b635fc4c61f0575dbc4d2939edbe2&appverion=508500&ch=blf1298_10928_001&session_id=153F4EEE16F56A43FD63ZD21B866413ED9BE044EFB876A115C62DBED82EE4C824D&dzh=1&scp=0&appid=10001&utype=0&rtype=2&pushid=7b4aaf1210a5bdbac3cea26d5030a419&ptype=5&gender=1&userInitPay=3&birt=1706674841000&instime=${t}&instId=${t}&chType=6&bidType=0&recSw=1&appType=0&pr=-1.0&tm=0&ac=999&gid=${gid}&nid=${nid}&sort=${s}&gsort=0&sgsort=0&sequence=1&chapter_name=${c}&snk=${snk}`;
java.ajax(url)
</js>$.content<js>
function a(str) {
	str = String(str);
	length = str.length / 2;
	bArr = [];
	for (i = 0; i < length; i++) {
		i2 = i * 2;
		bArr[i] =  intToByte(parseInt(str.substring(i2, i2 + 2), 16));
  }
  return bArr;
}
function intToByte(i) {
	var b = i & 0xFF;var c = 0;
	if (b >= 128) {c = b % 128;c = -1 * (128 - c);}
	else {c = b;}
	return c;
}

 function byteToHexString(arr) {
    return arr.reduce((accu, item) => {
        let a =(item&0xff).toString(16)
        if (a.length ==1) a = "0" + a
        return accu += a
    }, "")
  }
  function hextoBase64(t) {
	function parse(t) {
		t = String(t)
		for (var e = t.length, r = [], i = 0; i < e; i += 2){
		r[i >>> 3] |= parseInt(t.substr(i, 2), 16) << 24 - i % 8 * 4;
		}
		return r;
	}
	function stringify(t) {
		var e = t
		, r = 4 * t.length
		, i = "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/=";
		for (var n = [], o = 0; o < r; o += 3){
		    for (var s = (e[o >>> 2] >>> 24 - o % 4 * 8 & 255) << 16 | (e[o + 1 >>> 2] >>> 24 - (o + 1) % 4 * 8 & 255) << 8 | e[o + 2 >>> 2] >>> 24 - (o + 2) % 4 * 8 & 255, a = 0; a < 4 && o + .75 * a < r; a++){
			n.push(i.charAt(s >>> 6 * (3 - a) & 63));}
		}
		var c = i.charAt(64);
		if (c){
		   for (; n.length % 4; ){
			      n.push(c);}
		}
		return n.join("")
	}
	return stringify(parse(t));
}

sf = "DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding";
d=hextoBase64(byteToHexString(a(result)));
key = iv = "EaSoUcNt";
result=java.aesBase64DecodeToString(d,key,sf,iv);
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
    let list=[],
    push=(text,href,vol)=>list.push({
        "text": text,
        "href": href,
        "vol": vol
    });
    let c=result.match(/\[\{"id"[\s\S]*?\]/g),
    v=java.getElements('[class^="text-lg"]>div');
    for (i=0;i<c.length;i++){
    	    push(v[c.length-(i+1)].text(),'',true);
    	    let j=JSON.parse(c[c.length-(i+1)]);
    	    j.reverse().forEach(n=>{
    	        push(n.title,'/cn/chapters/'+n.id,false);
    	    });
    	};
    	list;
</js>

<js>

if(/forum/.test(baseUrl)){
zuozhe=java.getString("td[rowspan='2']@div.0@a@text").split("\n");
shijian=java.getString(".authorinfo em@text").split("\n");
neir=java.getString(".postmessage@tr@td@ownText").split("\n");
}
if(/books/.test(baseUrl)){	zuozhe=java.getString("@@.noveltitle@p.0@text").split("\n");
shijian=java.getString(".noveltitle@p.0@text").split("\n");
neir=java.getString(".novelcontent@ownText").split("\n");
}

//修整内容后依次拼接
for(i=0;i<zuozhe.length;i++){
txt=String(neir[i]).replace(/\s/g,"\n");
zz=String(zuozhe[i]).replace(/ 发表.*/,"");
sj=String(shijian[i]).replace(/.*发表/,"发表");
java.log(zz+lz);

//只看楼主
if (book.getVariable("custom")!=""){
  if(zz==lz){
  list=list+"\n@"+zz+"__"+sj+"\n"+txt+"\n————\n";
  }else{};
}else{list=list+"\n@"+zz+"__"+sj+"\n"+txt+"\n————\n";}
}
list
if(list==""){"未获取到内容，或许是因为“只看楼主”功能开启中\n请尝试在详情页点击右上角删除书籍变量，关闭只看楼主功能后刷新本页面"}

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
eval(String(source.bookSourceComment));
info = JSON.parse(result).data.content;
result=JSON.parse(decode(info));

source_url = baseUrl.replace('/details/','/source/');
source_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(source_url)).data.content;
$ = JSON.parse(decode(source_info));

v=String(book.getVariable("custom"));
x=v.match(/^\d+$/)?v:0;
x=parseInt(x)<$.length?x:0;

result.updated_at = $[x].updated_at;
result.last_chapter_name = $[x].last_chapter_name;
result.tocUrl = source.getKey().replace('//s','//catalog')+"/"+$[x].site_path;
result.image = source.getKey().replace('//s','//res') + '/'+result.image;


if($.length>1){
		y = '\n📌使用说明： 根据序号设置书籍变量来切换来源(默认0)\n🎯当前源：序号🔺'+x+'🔻【'+$[x].site_name+'】'+(x==0?' (默认)':'');
for(i in $){
		y += '\n❤序号🔺'+i+'🔻【'+$[i].site_name+'】 \n选用率：'+$[i].choose+' \n更新时间： '+$[i].updated_at+'\n最新章节： '+$[i].last_chapter_name;
	}
result.remark += y
}


result = JSON.stringify(result);
</js>

<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
            
var document = JsDom.parse(src);
            
// 获取包含<li>元素的<div>元素
var divs = document.select('ul.list > div');

// 将divs转换为数组以便排序
var divArray = [];
for (var i = 0; i < divs.size(); i++) {
    divArray.push(divs.get(i));
}

// 按照data-id属性对divArray进行排序
divArray.sort(function(a, b) {
    var pageA = parseInt(a.attr('data-id'), 10);
    var pageB = parseInt(b.attr('data-id'), 10);
    return pageA - pageB;
});

var list = [];
// 遍历排序后的divArray
for (var i = 0; i < divArray.length; i++) {
    var div = divArray[i];
    var dataId = div.attr('data-id');
    // 获取当前div下的所有<li>元素
    var lis = div.select('li');
    for (var j = 0; j < lis.size(); j++) {
        var li = lis.get(j);
        var a = li.select('a').first();
        if (a != null) {
            list.push({
                text: a.text(),
                id: dataId, // 使用data-id属性
                url: a.attr('href')
            });
        }
    }
}

//java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
list;
</js>

元素的

元素的文本内容 }); // 合并文本内容 data.mergedText += paragraphs + "\n"; // 添加换行符以便分隔每个dd的内容 } // 输出结果 //java.log(JSON.stringify(list)); //java.log(data.mergedText); // 返回data对象 result = data.mergedText;

text
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
//java.log(String(bes))
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    var txt = java.getString("#txt@html");
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    // 遍历数组，使用阅读内置Base64解码方法
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
            
var document = JsDom.parse(src);
            
// 获取包含<li>元素的<div>元素
var divs = document.select('ul.list > div');

// 将divs转换为数组以便排序
var divArray = [];
for (var i = 0; i < divs.size(); i++) {
    divArray.push(divs.get(i));
}

// 按照data-id属性对divArray进行排序
divArray.sort(function(a, b) {
    var pageA = parseInt(a.attr('data-id'), 10);
    var pageB = parseInt(b.attr('data-id'), 10);
    return pageA - pageB;
});

var list = [];
// 遍历排序后的divArray
for (var i = 0; i < divArray.length; i++) {
    var div = divArray[i];
    var dataId = div.attr('data-id');
    // 获取当前div下的所有<li>元素
    var lis = div.select('li');
    for (var j = 0; j < lis.size(); j++) {
        var li = lis.get(j);
        var a = li.select('a').first();
        if (a != null) {
            list.push({
                text: a.text(),
                id: dataId, // 使用data-id属性
                url: a.attr('href')
            });
        }
    }
}

//java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
list;
</js>

元素的文本内容为数组，保持原有顺序 }); // 合并文本内容，每个

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    java.setContent(ml)
    var txt = java.getString("#txt>p@text");
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    // 遍历数组，使用阅读内置Base64解码方法
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
            
var document = JsDom.parse(src);
            
// 获取包含<li>元素的<div>元素
var divs = document.select('ul.list > div');

// 将divs转换为数组以便排序
var divArray = [];
for (var i = 0; i < divs.size(); i++) {
    divArray.push(divs.get(i));
}

// 按照data-id属性对divArray进行排序
divArray.sort(function(a, b) {
    var pageA = parseInt(a.attr('data-id'), 10);
    var pageB = parseInt(b.attr('data-id'), 10);
    return pageA - pageB;
});

var list = [];
// 遍历排序后的divArray
for (var i = 0; i < divArray.length; i++) {
    var div = divArray[i];
    var dataId = div.attr('data-id');
    // 获取当前div下的所有<li>元素
    var lis = div.select('li');
    for (var j = 0; j < lis.size(); j++) {
        var li = lis.get(j);
        var a = li.select('a').first();
        if (a != null) {
            list.push({
                text: a.text(),
                id: dataId, // 使用data-id属性
                url: a.attr('href')
            });
        }
    }
}

//java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
list;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup; var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document; var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element; var document = JsDom.parse(src); // 获取包含

元素的

元素 var dds = document.select('div.content > dd'); // 将dds转换为数组以便排序 var ddArray = []; for (var i = 0; i < dds.size(); i++) { ddArray.push(dds.get(i)); } // 按照data-id属性对ddArray进行排序 ddArray.sort(function(a, b) { var pageA = parseInt(a.attr('data-id'), 10); var pageB = parseInt(b.attr('data-id'), 10); return pageA - pageB; }); var list = []; var data = { mergedText: "" }; // 遍历排序后的ddArray for (var i = 0; i < ddArray.length; i++) { var dd = ddArray[i]; var dataId = dd.attr('data-id'); // 获取当前dd下的所有

元素的文本内容，保持原有顺序 var paragraphs = dd.select('p'); var paragraphTexts = []; for (var j = 0; j < paragraphs.size(); j++) { var paragraph = paragraphs.get(j); paragraphTexts.push(paragraph.text()); } list.push({ id: dataId, // 使用data-id属性 paragraphs: paragraphTexts // 存储所有

元素的文本内容为数组，保持原有顺序 }); // 合并文本内容，每个

内容后添加换行符，保持原有顺序 data.mergedText += paragraphTexts.join("\n") + "\n"; // 添加额外换行符以便分隔每个dd的内容 } // 输出结果 java.log(JSON.stringify(list)); java.log(data.mergedText); // 返回data对象 result = data.mergedText;

ruleBookInfo.tocUrl:
<js>
const sign_key = "d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1";
const action = "https://api-ks.wenxueapp.com/api/v1/chapter/chapter-list?";
var book_id = {{$.id}};

params = {
    "id": book_id
};

var urlEncode = function(param, key, encode) {
    if (param == null) return "";
    var paramStr = "";
    var t = typeof(param);
    if (t == "string" || t == "number" || t == "boolean") {
        paramStr += "&" + key + "=" + ((encode == null || encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
    } else {
        for (var i in param) {
            var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? "[" + i + "]" : "." + i);
            paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
        }
    }
    return paramStr;
};

var paramSign = String(java.md5Encode(
    Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre, n) => pre + n + "=" + params[n], "") + sign_key
));

params["sign"] = paramSign;

var cheaper_url = action + urlEncode(params) + "," + java.get("headers")

cheaper_url
</js>

    } else {

};

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var javaImporter = new JavaImporter();
javaImporter.importPackage(
    Packages.java.lang,
    Packages.javax.crypto.spec,
    Packages.javax.crypto,
    Packages.java.util
);
with (javaImporter) {
    function decode(content) {
        var ivEncryptedData = Base64.getDecoder().decode(String(content));
        var secretKey = SecretKeySpec(String("242ccb8230d709e1").getBytes(), "AES");
        var ivParameter = IvParameterSpec(Arrays.copyOfRange(ivEncryptedData, 0, 16));
        var cipher = Cipher.getInstance("AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding");
        cipher.init(2, secretKey, ivParameter);
        return String(cipher.doFinal(Arrays.copyOfRange(ivEncryptedData, 16, ivEncryptedData.length)));
    }
}

const signKey = "d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1";

var params = {
    "id": String(java.get("bid")),
    "chapterId": String(baseUrl.split("/").pop())
};

var urlEncode = function(param, key, encode) {
    if (param == null) return "";
    var paramStr = "";
    var paramType = typeof param;
    if (paramType == "string" || paramType == "number" || paramType == "boolean") {
        paramStr += "&" + key + "=" + ((encode == null || encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
    } else {
        for (var keyName in param) {
            var newKey = key == null ? keyName : key + (param instanceof Array ? "[" + keyName + "]" : "." + keyName);
            paramStr += urlEncode(param[keyName], newKey, encode);
        }
    }
    return paramStr;
};

paramSign = String(java.md5Encode(
    Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((accumulator, current) => accumulator + current + "=" + params[current], "") + signKey
));
params["sign"] = paramSign;
requestUrl = "https://api-ks.wenxueapp.com/api/v1/chapter/content?" + urlEncode(params);
decode(JSON.parse(java.ajax(requestUrl + "," + java.get("headers"))).data.content)
</js>

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
if (/No message|404/.test(src)){
	const host="https://m.kepub.net";
	const page=java.get('page');
	const key=java.get('key');
	const results=[
		`${host}/searchBookByPage?page=${page}&keyword=${key}`,
		`${host}/searchCopyrightBookByPage?page=${page}&keyword=${key}`
	].flatMap(url=>{
		const response=java.ajax(url);
		const {data}=JSON.parse(response);
		return data
	});
	java.t2s(JSON.stringify(results))
}else{
	result=src
}
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js> 
var J = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
var o = selector => String(J.select(selector).text()) ;
var og = selector => String(J.select('[property="og:' + selector + '"]').attr('content'));
var book = {
	name: og('novel:book_name').replace(/(全文|小说|免费阅读|最新章节).*|[(（].*[）)]/g, ''),
	author: og('novel:author'),
	kind: og('novel:category') + ',' + og('novel:status').replace(/中|已/, ''),
	latest: og('novel:latest_chapter_name').replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|章节目录|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(（【].*[求更谢乐发推].*/g, '') + ' • ' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-'),
	intro: '　　🔸最近更新：' + og('novel:update_time').replace(/(T|\s).*/, ' ').replace(/\//g, '-') + '\n' + og('description').replace(/.*(观看小说|简介)[:：]|分享书籍.*|各位书友.*/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, '\n'),
	cover: og('image'),
url:og('novel:read_url'),
};
book;
</js>

var lis="";
//获取所有dd标签，依次存入数组arr
var aDiv = java.getElements("@@.list@div");
    var arr = [];
    for(var i=0;i<aDiv.length;i++){
    	        arr.push(aDiv[i]);
    }
//按data-id属性值升序排列arr中的元素
    arr.sort(function(a,b){return a.attr('data-id') - b.attr('data-id')});
//依次拼接排序后arr中的元素
    for(var i=0;i<arr.length;i++){
    	lis=lis+arr[i];
    }
    lis
    //java.log(lis)
</js>

c=[]
R.forEach(r=>{
	i=String(r.attr('href')).replace(/.+\/\d+\/(\d+)\.html/,`$1`)
	//java.log(i)
	c.push({
		name:r.text(),
		url:r.attr('href'),
		index:i
		})
	})
try{
	o=temp.match(/originalOrder[^=]*=[^\[]*\[([^\]]+)\]/)[1]
	o=o.split(",")
	c.sort((a,b)=>o[c.indexOf(a)]-o[c.indexOf(b)])
	}catch (err){
		java.log(err)
		c.sort((a,b)=>a.index-b.index)
		}
	result=c
</js>

<js>
url="https:"+result.match(/initTxt\("([^"]+)","[^"]+"\)/)[1];
r=String(java.ajax(url).match(/_txt_call\(([\s\S]+\})\)/)[1]);
var r = eval('(' + r + ')');
				if(r.content!=null){				
      var e = r.replace;
				for (var n in e) {
					var i = new RegExp(e[n], "ig");
					r.content = r.content.replace(i, n)
				}
				result=r.content
					}else{result="章节加载失败，或者内容正在手打中，请换源或稍后访问~"}
</js>

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
var sk=java.get("sk");
var su=source.getKey();
var v=source.getVariable();
var so=/s.php/.test(baseUrl);
if(so){
	var bu=baseUrl.match(/^(.+)\/s.php/)[1];
if(bu!=su&&bu!=v){
	source.setVariable(bu);
	java.toast("地址变动，重新搜索加载！")
	result=java.ajax(baseUrl+`,{
		"body": "s=${String(sk)}",
		"method": "POST"}`);
		}
	}else{result=result}
	result;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
  var bookId=baseUrl.match(/(\d+)/)[1]
 result=java.ajax("https://wxapp.qidian.com/api/book/categoryV2?bookId="+bookId+"&_csrfToken=")
 var charts=[];
JSON.parse(result).data.vs.map(i=>{
i.cs.map(o=>{
var chart={"id":o.id,"title":o.cN,"v":o.sS==0,"t":o.uT+ "  " + o.cnt +"字"}
if(chart.v){
chart.url="http://qd.yyhydb-123546.top/api/content/qd?bid="+bookId+"&cid="+o.id+"&deviceId="+java.androidId()
}else{
chart.url="https://m.qidian.com/chapter/"+bookId+"/"+o.id+"/"
}
charts.push(chart);
})
})
 charts;
</js>

@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
//java.log(String(bes))
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    var txt = java.getString("#txt@html");
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    // 遍历数组，使用阅读内置Base64解码方法
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
base = baseUrl;
id = baseUrl.match(/(\d+\/)/)[1]
java.put("id",id)
lis = java.getElements('#list-chapterAll@dd');
var list = [];

for (var i = 0; i < lis.length; i++) {
     var href = lis[i].select('a').attr('href');
     var text = lis[i].text();
     if (href==0) {
        if ( i < lis.length - 1 ) {
            var url = "https://www.baidu.com/" + id + lis[i + 1].select('a').attr('href');         
        } else {
            var url = "https://cn.bing.com/" + id + lis[i - 1].select('a').attr('href');
        }
     } else { var url = base + href; }
     java.log(lis[i].text()+":"+url);
     list.push({"text": text, "href": url});
}

list
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
/*调试->右上角的小虫子，随便搜一个词*/
/*Token写了东西的话要删掉才能进行下面步骤：
①填上电话号码点调试会获取验证码；
②填上验证码点调试会获取token；
③把token填在Token【目录的章节url那也有个token记得也要填，不填的话从发现点的书是没有登录的】；
④把电话号码跟验证码的值删了【❗️填了电话号码会一搜索就发验证码】，保存书源*/
/*如登录过期需要重新登录，请删除以前填写的token再调试获取验证码，重复前面的步骤*/

电话号码="";

验证码="";

Token="34304776fc02d974a641eef13b603e20";

//下面不要动
var time = Math.round(new Date()/1000);
token=java.put('token',Token);
function sign(list){
var sb='';
sb+="Fb0gqLMSf5Android";
list=list.sort();
i=0;
while(i<list.length){
if(i==0){
sb+=list[i]
}else{
    if(list[i].match(/lang-app=/)){  
      i2=i+1;
     i3=i2+1;
     if (list[i2] != null && list[i2].match(/lang=/)) {
                        sb+="&";
                        sb+=list[i2];
                        
                        sb+="&";
                        sb+=list[i];
                        
                        i = i3;
                    }
           }
                sb+="&";
                sb+=list[i];             
      }
i++
}
sb+="AEdDtho2CjiH901aVK7swFqclu6NmzJ4";
return String(java.md5Encode(sb)).toUpperCase()
}



//获取验证码开始
num=电话号码;
y=验证码;
if(num.match(/^\d{11}$/) && !y  && !Token){
list2=[
 "mobile=86"+num,
"appId=",
"osType=2",
"product=1",
"sysVer=10",
"time="+time,
"token="+token,
"ver=2.1.3",
"packageName=com.lestory.jihua.an",
"lang-app=zh-Hans",
"lang=zh-hans",
"locale=CN"
]
s=sign(list2);
json2={ "mobile": "86"+String(num),"product":"1","ver":"2.1.3","sign":s,"sysVer":"10","locale":"CN","token":String(token),"lang-app":"zh-Hans","appId":"","osType":"2","time":time,"packageName":"com.lestory.jihua.an","lang":"zh-hans"}

option1={
"method": "POST",
"body": JSON.stringify(json2)
}
url='http://api.lestory.cn/message/send,'+JSON.stringify(option1);
java.log(JSON.parse(java.ajax(url)).msg=="success"?"验证码发送成功，请注意短信":"验证码获取失败，请稍候再试");
}else if(y && !Token){
list2=[
 "mobile=86"+num,
"code="+y,
"appId=",
"osType=2",
"product=1",
"sysVer=10",
"time="+time,
"token="+token,
"ver=2.1.3",
"packageName=com.lestory.jihua.an",
"lang-app=zh-Hans",
"lang=zh-hans",
"locale=CN"
]
s=sign(list2);
json2={ "code":String(y),"mobile": "86"+String(num),"product":"1","ver":"2.1.3","sign":s,"sysVer":"10","locale":"CN","token":String(token),"lang-app":"zh-Hans","appId":"","osType":"2","time":time,"packageName":"com.lestory.jihua.an","lang":"zh-hans"}

option1={
"method": "POST",
"body": JSON.stringify(json2)
}
url='http://api.lestory.cn/user/mobile-login,'+JSON.stringify(option1);
a=JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
java.log(a.msg=="success"?'❗️下面是你的Token，请复制❗️\n'+a.data.user_token:JSON.stringify(a));
}
//获取验证码结束






list=[
"page_num="+page,

function qm_last() {
	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];

1.编辑书源添加自己的账号信息，找到目录列表规则，按提示添加账号信息
2.如果添加了账号信息仍然无法获取内容，请尝试刷新或更新账号信息（方式二）
3.必要说明：如果使用方式一添加了账号信息，每次打开新的书籍详情页或刷新正文都会重新获取账号信息，因此之前获取的书籍正文的链接将会失效，因此建议全文下载或者按2操作

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
  let $ = JSON.parse(result)
  let uid = java.get("uid") != "undefined" ? java.get("uid") : "-1"
  let array = []
  $.data.chapterList.forEach((booklet) => {
    array.push({
    	 name: booklet.title,
    	 isv: true
    })
    booklet.chapterList.forEach((chapter) => {
    	 let sign = java.md5Encode(`BookID=${$.data.id}&UserID=${uid}&chapter_id=${chapter.id}&isDevice=Android&isMarket=true&regDevice=2&key=87ac02d392a8d3566fe7748c8de00af3&secrect=57dcuidu8aa8062bfe8042ea65310669`).toString().toUpperCase()
    	 let data = JSON.stringify({
    	   BookID: $.data.id,
    	   UserID: uid,
    	   chapter_id: chapter.id,
    	   isDevice: "Android",
    	   isMarket:"true",
    	   regDevice: "2",
    	   sign: sign
    	 })
      let op = JSON.stringify({
        method: "POST",
        body: data
      })
      array.push({
        name: chapter.title,
        url: "https://api.shaoniandream.com/Booklibrary/readchapter," + op,
        time: java.timeFormat(chapter.release_time_now * 1000),
        vip: chapter.isFree == 1,
        buy: chapter.lock == 1
      })
    })
  })
  array
</js>
